category_sources: source_facts.description says libusb-compat is a library for USB device access.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libusb-compat; official libusb source-control uses libusb-compat-0.1 for the compatibility working tree.
docs_sources: Official libusb GitHub repository libusb-compat-0.1 is the README documentation surface; the official libusb wiki documents the legacy API compatibility wrapper.
repo_sources: Official libusb GitHub repository libusb/libusb-compat-0.1 is identified as the working tree for libusb-compat-0.1.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies USB device access; source_facts.name identifies the compatibility package; official libusb wiki references the legacy API wrapper.
